Who We Are

About Us

Our Story

Built From the Ground Up

Eleazar Ortega started laying concrete as a young man, learning the trade from the ground up — literally. What began as a one-man operation in the Wichita area grew naturally as his sons came of age and joined the business, bringing with them the same work ethic their father modeled every day.

Today, Ortega & Sons Concrete is a recognized name throughout Sedgwick County. We've poured driveways for growing families, foundations for new businesses, and parking lots for commercial developments — all with the same level of care that built this company from scratch.

We remain family-owned and operated because we believe that accountability starts at home. When Eleazar signs off on a job, his name — and his family's name — is on every square foot of it.

The People Behind the Pour

Meet the Team

EO

Eleazar Ortega

Founder & Master Concrete Finisher

With over 20 years in the trade, Eleazar oversees all projects and ensures every job meets his personal standard of excellence.

JO

Team Lead

Foreman & Project Coordinator

Manages on-site crews, coordinates deliveries, and ensures projects stay on schedule from start to finish.

SO

Estimator

Estimating & Customer Relations

Walks every project with customers, provides detailed estimates, and stays in communication throughout the entire process.

How We Work

Our Core Values

Quality First

We never cut corners. Every mix ratio, every pour, every finish is done to last decades — not just look good for the inspection.

Family Values

We treat your property like it's our own. A family business means your satisfaction is personal — our reputation is on the line with every job.

On Time, Every Time

We respect your schedule. From showing up to the estimate on time to hitting project milestones, we communicate every step of the way.

Fair & Transparent

No surprise charges. We walk you through our quotes line-by-line and only do work we've agreed to in advance.

Where We Work

Service Area

We proudly serve Wichita and the surrounding communities throughout Sedgwick County and beyond. If you're nearby, give us a call — we'll let you know if we can make it work.

Wichita Derby Andover Maize Goddard Valley Center Haysville Mulvane El Dorado Newton
Contact Us Today

Family-owned and operated, Ortega & Sons Concrete delivers expert residential and commercial concrete work throughout the Wichita, KS area. Quality craftsmanship on every pour.

  • Patios & Walkways

  • Concrete Repair
